qualificationType: National Certificate: Hairdressing (NQF Level 2–3) / FET Certificate (Level 4), QCTO
duration: 2 years full-time study plus one year training in a salon. Each level (L2, L3, L4) must be completed before commencing the next.
admissionRequirement: Grade 9–12. Minimum age 16. Not funded by NSFAS.

curriculum.note: Career opportunities: hair stylist, salon owner, cruise-line work, TV/theatre hair technician, sales representative for hair-care product manufacturers.

courseName: NC (V) Business Studies — Finance, Economics & Accounting
duration: One year per NQF Level (Levels 2–4)
admissionRequirement: NQF Level 2: Grade 9 or higher. NQF Levels 3 & 4: Competency in learning outcomes at the preceding NQF Level of the same programme.

curriculum.note: Core subjects shared across levels 2–4; Entrepreneurship (L2) is replaced by Project Management from L3 onward.

courseName: NC (V) Business Studies — Information & Communication Technology
duration: One year per NQF Level (Levels 2–4)
admissionRequirement: NQF Level 2: Grade 9 or higher. NQF Levels 3 & 4: Competency in learning outcomes at the preceding NQF Level of the same programme.

curriculum.note: Curriculum changes significantly from L2 to L3/4 as the programme moves from IT foundations into systems analysis/programming. Electronic Control & Digital Electronics vs Basic Multimedia (L2) and Electronic Control & Digital Electronics vs Multimedia Content (L3/4) are alternative electives.

duration: One year per NQF Level (Levels 2–4)
admissionRequirement: NQF Level 2: Grade 9 or higher. NQF Levels 3 & 4: Competency in learning outcomes at the preceding NQF Level of the same programme.

curriculum.note: Same four core subjects across all levels.

duration: One year per NQF Level (Levels 2–4)
admissionRequirement: NQF Level 2: Grade 9 or higher. NQF Levels 3 & 4: Competency in learning outcomes at the preceding NQF Level of the same programme.

curriculum.note: Same five core subjects across all levels. Contact Centre Operations is offered at the Springs Campus.

duration: One year per NQF Level (Levels 2–4)
admissionRequirement: NQF Level 2: Grade 9 or higher. NQF Levels 3 & 4: Competency in learning outcomes at the preceding NQF Level of the same programme.

curriculum.note: Core vocational subjects are the same across levels; elective is Entrepreneurship + Applied Accounting at L2, Project Management + Applied Accounting from L3.

courseName: NC (V) Business Studies — Safety in Society
duration: One year per NQF Level (Levels 2–4)
admissionRequirement: NQF Level 2: Grade 9 or higher. NQF Levels 3 & 4: Competency in learning outcomes at the preceding NQF Level of the same programme.

curriculum.note: Distinct subject set at each level, building from policing/law fundamentals (L2) through criminal justice structures (L3) to applied policing practice (L4).

duration: One year per NQF Level (Levels 2–4)
admissionRequirement: NQF Level 2: Grade 9 or higher. NQF Levels 3 & 4: Competency in learning outcomes at the preceding NQF Level of the same programme.

curriculum.note: Same four core subjects across all levels.

duration: One year per NQF Level (Levels 2–4)
admissionRequirement: NQF Level 2: Grade 9 or higher. NQF Levels 3 & 4: Competency in learning outcomes at the preceding NQF Level of the same programme.

courseName: NC (V) Engineering Studies — Civil Engineering and Building Construction
duration: One year per NQF Level (Levels 2–4)
admissionRequirement: NQF Level 2: Grade 9 or higher. NQF Levels 3 & 4: Competency in learning outcomes at the preceding NQF Level of the same programme.

curriculum.note: Same core vocational subjects and Masonry elective across all levels.

courseName: NC (V) Engineering Studies — Electrical Infrastructure Construction
duration: One year per NQF Level (Levels 2–4)
admissionRequirement: NQF Level 2: Grade 9 or higher. NQF Levels 3 & 4: Competency in learning outcomes at the preceding NQF Level of the same programme.

curriculum.note: Workshop Practice (L2 & L4) is called Electrical Workmanship at L3. Electrical Systems & Construction / Physical Science are alternative electives at every level.

courseName: NC (V) Engineering Studies — Engineering and Related Design
duration: One year per NQF Level (Levels 2–4)
admissionRequirement: NQF Level 2: Grade 9 or higher. NQF Levels 3 & 4: Competency in learning outcomes at the preceding NQF Level of the same programme.

curriculum.note: Curriculum changes substantially by level. Electives (Physical Science, Fitting & Turning, Automotive Repair & Maintenance, Engineering Fabrication—Boilermaking) are offered at L2 and L4; Engineering Fabrication—Boilermaking is offered at the Daveyton Campus.

courseName: NC (V) Engineering Studies — Process Plant Operations
duration: One year per NQF Level (Levels 2–4)
admissionRequirement: NQF Level 2: Grade 9 or higher. NQF Levels 3 & 4: Competency in learning outcomes at the preceding NQF Level of the same programme.

curriculum.note: Physical Science, Process Technology and Pulp and Papermaking Technology run throughout; Engineering Fundamentals (L2) is replaced by Process Control from L3.
